tasks.subject: Audit Lumen runtime behavior and propose a proposal-first operating model
tasks.description: Inspect the current runtime, profile, artifact history, and task behavior. Produce a grounded proposal for how Lumen should observe, propose, implement, verify, and hand off work instead of making one-off changes.

payload.objective: Turn Lumen into a proposal-first operator/builder instead of a one-shot content generator.
acceptance_criteria: Identifies concrete current runtime failure modes and drift patterns
Defines a proposal -> implementation -> verification loop for future tasks
Defines required artifacts for each phase
Defines how Lumen should reason about modifying its own code and config
payload.operator_goal: Create a usable operating model for disciplined self-improvement.

tasks.subject: Design the Lumen builder profile and bounded self-modification rules
tasks.description: Write a concrete spec for a builder-oriented Lumen mode that can modify code within declared scope, requires a proposal artifact first, and records verification evidence after implementation.

payload.objective: Define how Lumen should safely modify its own runtime and related code.
acceptance_criteria: Specifies allowed write scope
Specifies proposal artifact format
Specifies verification and rollback requirements
Specifies when Lumen should refuse or defer a change
payload.operator_goal: Produce a precise spec for Lumen's next operating mode.

tasks.subject: Plan the concrete runtime and profile changes needed for proposal-first execution
tasks.description: Based on the audit and builder-profile spec, identify the exact code/config changes required to support proposal-first work, bounded writes, and verification artifacts.

payload.objective: Translate the proposal-first model into specific implementation work.
acceptance_criteria: Lists exact files to change
Separates profile changes from runtime changes
Defines verification for each planned change
Orders work into safe implementation sequence
payload.operator_goal: Produce an implementation-ready change plan instead of ad hoc edits.

tasks.subject: Audit Lumen's AIBTC wallet and identity readiness
tasks.description: Assess the current state of Lumen wallet setup, registration, signature requirements, and identity readiness. Distinguish proven capabilities, missing tooling, and unresolved prerequisites.

payload.objective: Establish what is actually required to get Lumen on AIBTC safely.
acceptance_criteria: Separates proven facts from unknowns
Identifies exact missing commands, tools, or secrets
Produces a staged path to registration and heartbeat proof
Does not invent wallet behavior not grounded in inputs
payload.operator_goal: Create the operator-grade wallet readiness report for Lumen.

tasks.subject: Design the integration plan for Lumen wallet, registration, and heartbeat support
tasks.description: Write a concrete spec for integrating wallet, registration, verification, and heartbeat capabilities into Lumen's operating environment. Include exact interfaces, dependencies, and verification steps.

payload.objective: Move from readiness analysis to an implementation spec for AIBTC participation.
acceptance_criteria: Defines exact proving steps for wallet creation, unlock, registration, verify, and heartbeat
Lists environment dependencies and secret requirements
Defines failure cases and rollback/safety controls
Identifies code/config areas that would need changes
payload.operator_goal: Produce an implementation-grade spec for getting Lumen onto AIBTC.

tasks.subject: Assess Lumen's AIBTC messaging and inbox readiness
tasks.description: Audit how Lumen would read inbox, reply, and mark messages read using AIBTC tooling and signatures. Produce a readiness report with exact message formats, prerequisites, and blockers.

payload.objective: Establish what is required before Lumen can safely use AIBTC messaging flows.
acceptance_criteria: Explains exact message signature formats required
Identifies missing tooling or missing proofs
Separates read-only capabilities from write capabilities
Includes safe next proving steps
payload.operator_goal: Create a practical messaging readiness report for Lumen.

tasks.subject: Assess Lumen's AIBTC News participation readiness
tasks.description: Audit beat discovery, beat claim prerequisites, signal filing requirements, and rate limits. Produce a readiness report and a safe proving plan for future participation.

payload.objective: Establish how Lumen could participate in AIBTC News without guesswork.
acceptance_criteria: Explains exact known write constraints and rate limits
Identifies beat selection considerations
Distinguishes what can be proven now from what depends on wallet readiness
Produces a staged proving plan
payload.operator_goal: Create the operator-grade News readiness report for Lumen.

tasks.subject: Produce a consolidated operator proving backlog and runbook set for Lumen
tasks.description: Using the runtime audit and AIBTC readiness reports, produce a staged proving backlog and runbook set covering self-upgrade, wallet readiness, messaging readiness, and news readiness.

payload.objective: Turn all prior analysis into an actionable proving agenda.
acceptance_criteria: Produces a sequenced backlog for the next implementation wave
Defines phase gates and success criteria
Maps each proving area to concrete next tasks
Keeps recommendations grounded in prior artifacts
payload.operator_goal: Create the next major proving program for Lumen.
